triggers.name: Worn off: Spirit of Eagle
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The avian spirit departs." — shared by 4 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Shield of Blades

triggers.name: Worn off: Foliage Shield
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "The mystical foliage vanishes."

triggers.name: Worn off: Circle of Seasons

triggers.name: Worn off: Spirit of Ash

triggers.name: Worn off: Form of the Howler
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You are no longer a wolf." — shared by 8 spells in spells_us_str (3 castable; also: Form of the Hunter, Share Form of the Great Wolf). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Feral Pack
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "You return to your true form." — shared by 2 spells in spells_us_str (1 castable; also: NPC-only ranks). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Girdle of Karana
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "Your Karanic strength fades."

triggers.name: Worn off: Mask of the Hunter
triggers.comments: Wear-off message: "Your features return to normal." — shared by 47 spells in spells_us_str (2 castable; also: Mask of the Stalker). Named after the alphabetically-first castable spell.

triggers.name: Worn off: Invisibility Versus Animals
